data.title: Apple TV+ Coming To Amazon Prime Video This Month: What You Need To Know About the $9.99 Add-On
data.description: Amazon and Apple have announced a collaboration to offer Apple TV+ as a $9.99 per month add-on subscription through Prime Video in the U.S., expanding Prime Video's premium content lineup.

data.title: Former Pfizer Executives Ian Read And Frank D'Amelio Support Albert Bourla's Leadership Amid Starboard Activism: 'Will Deliver Shareholder Value'
data.description: Former Pfizer Inc CEO Ian Read and ex-CFO Frank D'Amelio have decided to distance themselves from the activist campaign led by Starboard Value at the pharmaceutical giant.

data.title: Trump Advisor's Proposal Of 'Shadow Fed Chair' Turning Jerome Powell Into A Lame Duck Gets Slammed By Economist Claudia Sahm: 'What Could Possibly Go Wrong? Everything!'
data.description: Renowned economist Claudia Sahm expressed concerns over a proposal by a Trump advisor to establish a "shadow Fed chair," potentially undermining current Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.anananan

data.title: Nasdaq-Listed Cannabis Company Eyes Germany's New Hemp Legislation With Intense Interest
data.description: Flora Growth Corp. (NASDAQ: FLGC) plans to enter Germany's hemp market, following new legislation that liberalizes industrial hemp cultivation

data.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene Sticks To Weather Modification Theories Amid Ongoing Hurricane Emergency — Gets Head Examination Advice From Florida Republican
data.description: Georgia Republican Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) has come under scrutiny for propagating conspiracy theories about the government's ability to manipulate severe weather events such as hurricanes.
